title: Playground Demo Dossier
concept: A document-style workspace for documentation writers where a Playground is managed as a compact project dossier: cover metadata, inline source/settings/library/artifact sections, and a contextual detail drawer replace app rails and modal stacks.
focus: card grid with contextual detail drawer
compact enterprise SaaS styling with thin borders
inline settings and artifact tracking in the first viewport
flows: Start a Playground from Vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, imported zip, featured blueprints, or the full Blueprint gallery.
Save a temporary Playground in browser storage or to a local directory with visible file-copy progress.
Manage unsaved and browser-backed Playgrounds with open, rename, delete, and saved-list context.
Navigate and refresh the active WordPress site by route, with Homepage and WP Admin actions.
Use Site Manager document sections for settings, file browser, Blueprint editor, database tools, logs, and live preview.
Export and package demos through GitHub export, zip download, Blueprint link and bundle, and database.sqlite download.
featureCoverage: create from Gutenberg PR or branch
import from GitHub after account connection
browse and filter Blueprint gallery entries
save temporary Playground in browser storage
navigate active WordPress paths with URL input
refresh the active embedded WordPress page
use File browser with create folder/file, upload, browse, and code editing affordances
